headline: Company behind two city hotels files for Chapter 11 bankruptcy
summary: As the rising costs of operations continue to squeeze cash flow even with strong visitor numbers, a number of small and mid-size hotel and short-term rental platform operators have filed for bankruptcy in the last six months. In September 2025, the company behind hotels such as The Tuscany and ...

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on Marriott International, Raises Price Target to $331
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Stephen Grambling   maintains Marriott International (NASDAQ:MAR) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $328 to $331.
